payload.answer: Detected an open loop: the article could not be fetched, so its content remains unavailable.

open_loops.description: The user asked to remember an article at https://example.com/missing, but the fetch failed with a 404 network error, so the article content was not available to process.
open_loops.evidence: Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture. Mock fetch result: 404 network error.
